name: Aphid
cause: Infestation by aphids that suck plant sap, leading to yellowing and curling of leaves.
cure: Use insecticidal soap or neem oil. Introduce natural predators like ladybugs.

name: Black Rust
cause: Caused by the fungus Puccinia graminis, affecting stems and leaves.
cure: Use resistant varieties and apply fungicides. Remove infected plant debris.

name: Blast
cause: Caused by Magnaporthe oryzae fungus under warm and humid conditions.
cure: Apply fungicides early and use resistant crop varieties.

name: Brown Rust
cause: Caused by Puccinia triticina fungus, common in moderate temperatures.
cure: Use resistant varieties and apply fungicides when needed.

name: Common Root Rot
cause: Soil-borne fungi infect roots, often in dry conditions.
cure: Practice crop rotation and use treated seeds.

name: Fusarium Head Blight
cause: Caused by Fusarium fungi during wet and humid flowering conditions.
cure: Use resistant varieties and apply fungicides during flowering.

name: Healthy
cause: No disease present. Plant is in good condition.
cure: Maintain proper irrigation, fertilization, and regular monitoring.

name: Leaf Blight
cause: Caused by fungal pathogens under warm and moist conditions.
cure: Remove infected leaves and apply appropriate fungicides.

name: Mildew
cause: Powdery mildew fungus grows in humid conditions with poor airflow.
cure: Improve air circulation and apply sulfur-based fungicides.

name: Mite
cause: Infestation by mites that damage plant tissues and reduce growth.
cure: Use miticides or neem oil and maintain field hygiene.

name: Septoria
cause: Fungal disease causing leaf spots, thrives in wet conditions.
cure: Apply fungicides and remove infected plant debris.

name: Smut
cause: Fungal infection affecting grains and heads of wheat.
cure: Use certified seeds and apply seed treatment fungicides.

name: Stem fly
cause: Larvae bore into stems causing plant weakening and yield loss.
cure: Use insecticides and resistant crop varieties.

name: Tan spot
cure: Practice crop rotation and apply fungicides when necessary.

name: Yellow Rust
cause: Caused by Puccinia striiformis fungus in cool, moist climates.
cure: Use resistant varieties and apply fungicides early.
